mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_role WHERE role_id = #{roleId}

SELECT DISTINCT s.permission FROM user_role ur LEFT JOIN role_resource rr ON ur.role_id = rr.role_id LEFT JOIN resource s ON rr.resource_id = s.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.status = 0 AND rr.status = 0
SELECT DISTINCT r.name,r.id FROM user_role ur LEFT JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_role SET status = #{status} WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
